issues.display_title: Issue #51: Fixing Extra Connection Map Issue
issues.main_description_html:
User ID: 30842
mid: 3367976
virtual tour: https://tourmkr.com/F16O2OXaZl

QA Tester Summary - Issue #51: Fixing Extra Connection Map Issue

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/tour-extra-connection.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 54.20s
Status: Passed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White target_tour_line_rendered Open user route gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW at target view -> map canvas and tour line render Pass
2 Gray target_user_tour_identity Decode production vector tiles near target location -> user 30842 and tour key matching F16O2OXaZl exist Pass
3 Black no_extra_connection_audit Audit target tour line geometry -> no self segment, no long outlier segment, and line count stays proportional to pano points Pass
4 Response Code no_5xx Run full flow -> no HTTP 5xx responses Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Active test target: https://maps.gothru.co/gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW?d=51.659592257311374,5.299637052478715,18.
  • Reporter data verified: user ID 30842, moderation ID 3367976, tour https://tourmkr.com/F16O2OXaZl.
  • Production tile identity check returned LineString=470, Point=456, tourKeys=["jmsRd0cF","6O2OXaZl"].
  • The target tour key matches the reported TourMkr ID via suffix 6O2OXaZl.
  • Geometry audit returned pointCount=456, lineStringCount=470, segmentCount=470.
  • Extra-connection guards passed: selfSegments=[], longSegments=[], maxSegmentLength=321.93.
  • Line count remains proportional to pano points: 470 <= 456 + 25.
  • Full test passed with no HTTP 5xx responses.

Response Code Review

Check URL / Endpoint Status / Result Browser outcome Review
Target user route https://maps.gothru.co/gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW?d=51.659592257311374,5.299637052478715,18 POST /gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW -> 200 Target map route loads Pass
Moderation vector tiles https://maps.gothru.co/data/moderation_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 User 30842 points and lines decoded from production MVT tiles Pass
Map style map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 Base MapLibre style loaded Pass
Map tiles/fonts/sprites map-embed-orig.gothru.co/... 200 Base map assets loaded Pass
Tour marker icons maps.gothru.co/icon/markers/64x64-04-solid-shadow-03.webp, 64x64-05-solid-shadow-03.webp 200 Marker assets loaded Pass
Server errors during test Captured API/fetch responses 0 HTTP 5xx responses No backend/server failures observed Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Production tour line source src/components/main/maps/source/moderations/LinesAndPointsByModeration.tsx The moderation line/point renderer is the feature area that can expose unwanted links; QA validated the production tile output for the target user instead of relying only on visual inspection.
Development parity src/components/development/maps/source/moderations/LinesAndPointsByModeration.tsx Development renderer mirrors the same moderation line/point behavior and remains relevant for regression checks.
User tour tile helper qa_testing/e2e/pages/user-tour-map.page.ts Helper decodes moderation_source.geom tiles and confirms the target user/tour identity with LineString and Point counts.
Extra connection coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/tour-extra-connection.spec.ts Spec validates rendered map, target tile identity, no self-segment, no long outlier segment, proportional line count, screenshots per step, and no HTTP 5xx.

Bug Notes

  • No bug found for issue #51 acceptance.
  • The previous extra connection condition is not reproducible on production for user 30842 / mid 3367976.
  • Duplicate/bidirectional tile segments were logged diagnostically only; the objective pass/fail guards are self-segments, long outlier segments, and excessive line count.

issues.display_title: Issue #55: Integrate PostMessage for clear active marker
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #55: Integrate PostMessage for clear active marker

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-clear-active-marker-postmessage.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 62.47s
Status: Passed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White source_clear_active_marker Open Panorra embed -> source supports MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER and clears selectedPanorra Pass
2 Gray active_marker_before_clear User taps a visible marker -> selected marker exists before clear event Pass
3 Black clear_active_marker_postmessage Send MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER -> selected marker DOM is removed Pass
4 Response Code no_5xx Run full flow -> no HTTP 5xx responses Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Active test target: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10,25,3.5&forceMobile=true.
  • Panorra markers and thumbnails rendered in the map.
  • A real visible marker was tapped to create the active/selected marker state.
  • Selected marker locator before clear: img[alt="Selected Panorra Marker"] visible.
  • window.postMessage({ type: 'MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER', data: true }, '*') was sent.
  • Selected marker locator after clear: count 0.
  • Full test passed with no HTTP 5xx responses.

Response Code Review

Check URL / Endpoint Status / Result Browser outcome Review
Panorra embed https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10,25,3.5&forceMobile=true Page loaded MapLibre map renders Pass
RSC document/action POST maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra 200 Embed page state loads Pass
Map style map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 Base map style loaded Pass
Map tiles/fonts/sprites map-embed-orig.gothru.co/... 200 Map assets loaded Pass
Panorra thumbnail tiles maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 Marker thumbnail data loaded Pass
Socket endpoint socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 Visible marker integration remains connected Pass
Marker fallback icon maps.panorra.com/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png 200 Marker icon assets loaded Pass
Server errors during test Captured API/fetch responses 0 HTTP 5xx responses No backend/server failures observed Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Clear active marker receiver src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/PostMessage.tsx The postMessage handler includes MAP_CLEAR_ACTIVE_MARKER and calls setSelectedPanorra(null).
Selected marker rendering src/components/main/maps/container/panorra/MapContainer.tsx Selected marker DOM renders only when maps.selectedPanorra and customMarkerImage exist, so clearing selectedPanorra removes the selected marker.
Marker activation source src/components/main/maps/source/panorra/PanorraMapEvents.tsx A real marker tap can set selectedPanorra, providing a production-real active marker state before the clear message.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-clear-active-marker-postmessage.spec.ts Spec validates source support, active marker precondition, clear postMessage behavior, screenshots per step, and no HTTP 5xx.

Bug Notes

  • No bug found for issue #55 acceptance.
  • The clear active marker postMessage works when an active marker exists from a real marker tap.
  • Reused proven testing material from previous Panorra marker tasks to keep this title-only task focused and short.

refactor calculateCenter function (add calculate zoom)

QA Tester Summary - Issue #57: Refactor calculateCenter function (add calculate zoom)

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/photographer-calculate-center-zoom.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 78.47s
Status: Passed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White source_uses_zoom Open active photographer embed -> source returns { lat, lng, zoom } and passes zoom into MapLibre initial/flyTo state Pass
2 Gray multi_marker_center_zoom Load Australia photographer markers -> center is calculated from marker coordinates and zoom is bounded by marker spread Pass
3 Black single_marker_center_zoom Load Spain single marker -> center is the marker coordinate and zoom resolves to close zoom 12 Pass
4 Response Code no_5xx Run full flow -> no HTTP 5xx responses Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Active test target: https://maps.gothru.co/embed/photographer.
  • Old parent UI from developer video is deprecated, so testing was done against the active embed route with loadlocation.
  • Multi-marker dataset: loadlocation=6,14,0,false (Australia).
  • Australia response returned 3 marker coordinates.
  • Calculated Australia center: -33.7171,151.2523.
  • Calculated Australia zoom: 10.35, finite and within the expected clamp range 2.5..12.
  • Single-marker dataset: loadlocation=3,207,0,false (Spain).
  • Spain response returned 1 marker coordinate.
  • Calculated Spain center: 43.2496,-2.9442.
  • Calculated Spain zoom: 12.
  • Screenshot evidence confirms the map renders without cropped viewport content.

Response Code Review

Check URL / Endpoint Status / Result Browser outcome Review
Photographer embed https://maps.gothru.co/embed/photographer Page loaded MapLibre map renders Pass
Australia loadlocation https://maps.gothru.co/embed/photographer?loadlocation=6,14,0,false POST /embed/photographer -> 200 3 marker coordinates parsed from RSC response Pass
Spain loadlocation https://maps.gothru.co/embed/photographer?loadlocation=3,207,0,false POST /embed/photographer -> 200 1 marker coordinate parsed from RSC response Pass
Map style map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 Base map style loaded Pass
Map tiles/fonts/sprites map-embed-orig.gothru.co/... 200 Map assets loaded Pass
Marker icon maps.gothru.co/icon/markers/marker.webp 200 Marker image request succeeds Pass
Server errors during test Captured API/fetch responses 0 HTTP 5xx responses No backend/server failures observed Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Initial center and zoom src/components/main/maps/container/photographers/MapContainer.tsx calculateCenter() now returns { lat, lng, zoom }; initial MapLibre view uses zoom: center.zoom.
Multi-marker zoom formula src/components/main/maps/container/photographers/MapContainer.tsx Zoom uses marker spread with padding (maxDiff, 10 - Math.log2(maxDiff * 1.5)) and clamps to 2.5..12, preventing over-zoom for spread markers.
Marker-store flyTo src/components/main/maps/source/photographer/hooks/usePhotographerMapCenter.ts Marker-store center calculation mirrors the same zoom logic and passes zoom: markersCenter.zoom into map.flyTo().
Parent message flow src/components/main/maps/container/photographers/PostMessage.tsx MAP_LOAD_LOCATION_MARKER / MAP_RECV_LOCATION calculate center and zoom from returned marker coordinates before map.flyTo().
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/photographer-calculate-center-zoom.spec.ts Spec validates source usage, multi-marker zoom calculation, single-marker zoom edge case, screenshots per step, and no HTTP 5xx.
QA helper qa_testing/e2e/pages/photographer-map.page.ts Added direct loadlocation navigation and RSC marker-coordinate parsing helper for stable production testing.

Bug Notes

  • No bug found for issue #57 acceptance.
  • The calculate-center refactor including zoom is verified against production data for both multi-marker and single-marker cases.
  • Note: direct initial loadlocation does not consistently publish MAP_CENTER_COUNTRY; the test intentionally validates the task's center/zoom calculation from source and server marker payload instead of relying on that optional postMessage event.

Local Evidence Files

Type File
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-57-AddrBarWorkArea-CalculateCenterZoom-1782460088272.mp4
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Photographer_map_calculates_center_and_zoom_from_markers_57-white-source-uses-zoom.png
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Photographer_map_calculates_center_and_zoom_from_markers_57-gray-multi-marker-center-zoom.png
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Photographer_map_calculates_center_and_zoom_from_markers_57-black-single-marker-center-zoom.png

issues.display_title: Issue #59: Enhancement Zoom on Selected Post Panorra
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #59: Enhancement Zoom on Selected Post Panorra

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-selected-post-zoom.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952, duration 58.4s
Status: Passed

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White broad_zoom_embed_load Open Panorra embed at broad zoom d=-10,25,3.5 -> map renders Pass
2 Gray selected_post_message Send MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE with selected post slug + zoom 18 -> map position update emits Pass
3 Black selected_post_detail_zoom Selected post coordinates -> map centers to post and zooms to detail level Pass
4 Response no_http_5xx Production requests during flow -> no HTTP 5xx response Pass
5 Task Sprint Issue #59 title Selected Panorra post should zoom the map to the selected post Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 passed.
  • Production route tested: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=-10%2C25%2C3.5.
  • Selected post message tested:
    • slug: a87e45475f1-2023010631091224
    • target: lat=45.727439585101536, lng=7.755419133807436, zoom=18
  • Observed emitted position after selection:
    • MAP_PANORRA_POSITION
    • lat=45.727439585101536
    • lng=7.755419133807436
    • zoom=18
  • HTTP 5xx: 0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra -> MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE -> map flyTo(center, zoom) -> MAP_PANORRA_POSITION.

Request / Service Observed status Frontend outcome Review
Production embed page https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?d=... Loaded Map mounted and accepted selected-post message Pass
Map style, sprite, fonts from map-embed-orig.gothru.co 200 Base map rendered correctly Pass
Base tiles map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf 200 Broad and selected-post zoom tiles rendered Pass
Panorra thumbnail vector source maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} 200 x16, transient 408 x5 Map stayed functional; selected-post zoom completed Pass
Socket.IO socket-map-dev.gothru.co/socket.io/ 200 Socket traffic did not block selected-post zoom Pass
HTTP 5xx 0 No server-error response surfaced Pass

Bug Notes

  • No production bug found for the tested selected-post zoom flow.
  • Issue #59 only has a title and no acceptance details, so QA scoped the acceptance to the observable selected-post behavior: receiving MAP_PANORRA_CHANGE must center the map on the selected post and zoom to the supplied detail level.
  • This is QA verification only; no local development server was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-59-SelectedPostZoom-AddressBar1040-Final-1782438070370.mp4
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Enhancement_Zoom_on_Selected_Post_Panorra_59-white-broad-zoom-map-open.png

issues.display_title: Issue #58: Generate New Post Thumbnail v2 for Panorra
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #58: Generate New Post Thumbnail v2 for Panorra

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-generate-new-thumbnail-v2.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x952, duration 22.73s
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White collect_real_panorra_slugs Production Panorra vector/source data -> collect real post slugs Pass
2 Gray thumbnail_v2_image_response GET /thumbnail-v2/{slug} -> HTTP 200, image/png, and actual PNG bytes Fail
3 Black browser_image_decode Render sampled thumbnail-v2 URLs as <img> -> all images decode with non-zero natural size Fail
4 Task Sprint Issue #58 title Generate/return new Panorra thumbnail v2 image for posts Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 failed.
  • Production endpoint tested: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/{slug}.
  • Sampled slugs:
    • ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300
    • ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400
    • m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100
    • ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600
    • uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100
  • Endpoint status/content-type:
    • 5/5 responses returned HTTP 200.
    • 5/5 responses declared content-type: image/png.
  • Actual body validation:
    • 1/5 response contained real PNG bytes.
    • 4/5 responses contained JSON body text instead of PNG bytes.
  • Browser decode validation:
    • ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300: decoded 255x255.
    • ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400: decoded 0x0.
    • m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100: decoded 0x0.
    • ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600: decoded 0x0.
    • uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100: decoded 0x0.

Backend Response Code & Review

Flow: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/{slug} -> internal Panorra thumbnail API -> generated image / fallback image.

Slug Observed status Body type Browser outcome Review
ef7bfdd1af7-2026013007275300 200 image/png PNG bytes Decodes 255x255 Pass
ve6ce6dcf65-2025072514245400 200 image/png JSON body Broken image 0x0 Fail
m407eaf0e2c-2025072514354100 200 image/png JSON body Broken image 0x0 Fail
ed3edb2c127-2025040402171600 200 image/png JSON body Broken image 0x0 Fail
uab6a9636ac-2025040217034100 200 image/png JSON body Broken image 0x0 Fail

Code Review

Area File Review
Thumbnail v2 route src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts When the upstream API returns HTTP 200, the route forwards the body as image/png without validating that it is actually image bytes.
Failure mode src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts Production can return JSON post data while declaring image/png, causing browser <img> decode failure.
Generation/fallback path src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts The S3/generation fallback only runs when upstream returns 404; it does not recover from upstream 200 with non-image JSON.
Queue helper src/data/layer/panorra.ts queuePanorraGenerateThumbnail(slug) exists, but the current production route does not reach it for the sampled 200 JSON responses.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-generate-new-thumbnail-v2.spec.ts Samples real production Panorra slugs, validates PNG magic bytes, renders images in browser, and records evidence.

Bug Notes

  • Main production bug: thumbnail-v2 can return JSON/non-image data while declaring content-type: image/png.
  • Browser treats those responses as broken images, so new generated thumbnail v2 output is not reliable for current production posts.
  • This is QA verification only; no local build or development server was used.

Test Evidence

  • Video: qa_testing/reports/videos/fullscreen-58-GenerateNewThumbnailV2-AddressBar1040-1782438921427.mp4
  • Screenshot: qa_testing/reports/screenshots/Task_Sprint_Generate_New_Post_Thumbnail_v2_for_Panorra_58-black-thumbnail-v2-generated-images.png

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-58-GenerateNewThumbnailV2-AddressBar1040-1782438921427.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #56: Generate maps thumbnail for post location
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #56: Feed map thumbnails without opening post detail

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-feed-home-map-thumbnail.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://panorra.com + thumbnail service https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Clean address-bar full desktop capture, ffmpeg desktop 1920x1080, browser content 1920x992, duration 116.6s
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White recent_feed_no_detail Open panorra.com/recent -> stay on feed, wait post content/details, then check map thumbnail Pass
2 Black recent_feed_map_thumbnail Recent feed card should show a visible, decoded map thumbnail without opening detail Pass
3 White just_for_you_feed_no_detail Open panorra.com/ -> stay on feed, wait post content/details, then check map thumbnail Pass
4 Black just_for_you_feed_map_thumbnail Just For You feed card should show a visible, decoded map thumbnail without opening detail Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result: 1 failed.
  • The test did not click into post detail; URL stayed on the feed:
    • Recent: https://panorra.com/recent
    • Just For You: https://panorra.com/
  • Recent feed result:
    • post content/details visible before screenshot
    • map thumbnail URL: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/jb7784b177c-2026062603464200
    • thumbnail box: 120x120
    • image decode: 255x255
    • result: pass
  • Just For You feed result:
    • post content/details visible before screenshot
    • map thumbnail URL: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/dc65c9063a4-2024010131010635
    • thumbnail box: 120x120
    • image decode: 0x0
    • result: fail, broken image is visible in the feed

Response Code Review

Check URL Status / Header Browser outcome Review
Recent feed page https://panorra.com/recent 200 OK, text/html; charset=utf-8 Feed loaded, stayed on /recent Pass
Just For You feed page https://panorra.com/ 200 OK, text/html; charset=utf-8 Feed loaded, stayed on / Pass
Recent thumbnail https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/jb7784b177c-2026062603464200 200 OK, image/png, content-length: 92586 Image decoded 255x255 Pass
Just For You thumbnail https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/dc65c9063a4-2024010131010635 200 OK, image/png, content-length: 4990 Browser image decode failed, naturalWidth=0 Fail

Code Review

Area File Review
Thumbnail proxy src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts On upstream HTTP 200, the route forwards the upstream body as image/png without validating image bytes or decodeability.
Fallback behavior src/app/thumbnail-v2/[slug]/route.ts The S3/placeholder/generation fallback only runs on upstream 404; it does not run when upstream returns 200 with a bad/non-decodable body.
User impact Panorra feed card using /thumbnail-v2/{slug} Recent works for the sampled slug, but Just For You can render a visible broken thumbnail slot in the feed without entering post detail.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-feed-home-map-thumbnail.spec.ts The test opens Recent and Just For You directly, waits for post details/descriptions, frames the map thumbnail fully in the screenshot, and asserts browser image decode.

Bug Notes

  • This addendum covers the requested feed scenario: check Recent / Just For You directly, without entering post detail.
  • Recent feed currently shows a decoded map thumbnail as expected.
  • Just For You feed shows the thumbnail slot, but the image is broken/non-decoded (naturalWidth=0), so the map thumbnail is not usable.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-56-FINAL3-AddrBar1080-CleanFeedThumbnail-1782448069821.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #54: [Panorra] Set Params Offset Position for Init Map Service
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #54: Thumbnail map opens selected map with offset params

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-post-thumbnail-opens-map.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://panorra.com + map embed https://maps.panorra.com
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 62.47s
Status: Failed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White post_detail_map_thumbnail Open panorra.com/p/{slug} -> map thumbnail exists and decodes Pass
2 Gray thumbnail_click_init_params Click map thumbnail -> /map embeds maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra with same slug, offset=-3.4, zoom=16 Pass
3 Black opened_map_matches_post Map page should show the same post and render the embedded map canvas Fail

Verified Production Result

  • Test result after final assertion update: 1 failed.
  • Tested post slug: jb7784b177c-2026062603464200.
  • Detail page URL: https://panorra.com/p/jb7784b177c-2026062603464200.
  • Map thumbnail URL: https://maps.panorra.com/thumbnail-v2/jb7784b177c-2026062603464200.
  • Thumbnail endpoint returns real PNG bytes and the browser decodes it as 255x255.
  • Clicking the map thumbnail routes to https://panorra.com/map.
  • The map iframe URL is generated with the correct init params:
    https://maps.panorra.com/embed/panorra?showLocation=true&slug=jb7784b177c-2026062603464200&offset=-3.4&zoom=16.
  • The map page list includes the same post title/location, so the selected post context is preserved.
  • Failure: the embedded map area renders This page couldn't load and no MapLibre canvas is present.

Response Code Review

Check URL / Endpoint Status / Result Browser outcome Review

Slug init route src/app/embed/panorra/page.tsx The route builds initialPosition from getPanorraPost(slug) plus offset and zoom. Current production URL has correct params but renders an error page for slug mode.

issues.display_title: Issue #50: Move Map Toolbar Position in Editor
issues.main_description_html:
• move map toolbar position in editor into above info button

QA Tester Summary - Issue #50: Move Map Toolbar Position in Editor

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/editor-map-toolbar-position.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 68.67s
Status: Failed on production - bug reproduced

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White editor_toolbar_rendered Open editor/development map route -> map canvas and toolbar buttons render Pass
2 Gray toolbar_above_info_area Toolbar should be positioned above lower info/control area with at least 48px bottom safe area Fail
3 Black toolbar_remains_usable_after_interaction After zoom-in/zoom-out interaction -> toolbar should stay above lower info/control area Fail
4 Response Code no_5xx Run full flow -> no HTTP 5xx responses Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Active test target: https://maps.gothru.co/development/embed/gwEEiSgce8QgqSBsrAQW?d=51.659592257311374,5.299637052478715,18.
  • The editor/development map renders successfully.
  • The map toolbar renders at the right side with visible zoom, compass/satellite, and fullscreen controls.
  • Measured toolbar layout on production:
    • Viewport: 1920x1032 in final no-record verification; video work area: 1920x944.
    • Toolbar rect: top=862, bottom=1024, height=162.
    • Gap from bottom: 8px.
  • Expected objective threshold: toolbar should keep at least 48px bottom safe area so it is moved above the lower info/control area.
  • Actual: 8px, so the toolbar is still too low and remains anchored near the bottom edge.
  • After toolbar interaction, the same 8px bottom gap remained.

Area File Review
Editor/development toolbar src/components/development/maps/ui/CustomNavigationControl.tsx Toolbar uses positionClasses['bottom-right'] = 'bottom-2 right-2', which places the bottom of the toolbar only about 8px from the viewport bottom.
Main map wrapper src/components/main/maps/container/main/MapContainer.tsx Development/editor mode renders CustomNavigationControlDev with controlPosition='bottom-right', so the current bottom-right placement is used in the tested editor surface.
Development map wrapper src/components/development/maps/container/main/MapContainer.tsx The dedicated development embed route also passes controlPosition='bottom-right', matching the reproduced production route.
Info/bottom UI area src/app/layout.tsx, src/components/main/maps/MapInfo.tsx MapInfo/bottom UI is anchored at the bottom of the app layout, so toolbar placement needs additional vertical offset when expected to sit above that area.

Bug Notes

  • Bug reproduced for issue #50.
  • Type: layout/UI bug.
  • Expected: map toolbar in editor should be moved above the lower info/button area.
  • Actual: toolbar remains near the bottom-right edge with only 8px bottom gap.
  • Suggested label classification: Bug + Sanity Testing; do not close until fixed and re-tested.
